description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:latest Docker image and a Maven local repository cache at .m2/repository. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy, and set MAVEN_OPTS to use the local repository. Add a kt-validate job in the build stage that runs mvn test-compile. Add a kt-test job in the test stage that runs mvn test then cat target/site/jacoco/index.html || true. Add a kt-deploy job in the deploy stage that runs mvn package and publishes the resulting target/*.jar files as an artifact named after the job.
